code: import api from"./api";export const getPayrolls=function(){let search=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";let page=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:1;return api.get("/payroll",{params:{search,page}});};export const generatePayroll=data=>api.post("/payroll/generate",data);export const getPayrollById=id=>api.get("/payroll/".concat(id));
